title: Spermacoce garro

The health benefits of Spermacoce garro include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Spermacoce garro include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Spermacoce garro is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are the most common herbal preparations made with this plant, as well as being used as an ingredient in some traditional remedies.
